hero.title: Complete Child Health Journey from

direct.title: Direct

hospital.description: Connect with your pediatrician. Get digital prescriptions and automated health records.

partner.title: Channel Partner
partner.description: Are you a healthcare provider or a partner? Register to join our network.

paperless.title: Paperless Records
paperless.description: Store all health documents digitally. Never lose a prescription or vaccination record again.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Get timely alerts for upcoming vaccinations and routine health checkups.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your child's health data is encrypted and protected with enterprise-grade security.
